prestazioni: LS7 V8 (7.0L, GM LS7 engine code) forced-induction conversion using a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger with a custom 4.0-inch V-band inlet, paired with a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate and a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a merge collector for optimized exhaust scavenging. Supporting mods include a Darton MID sleeves kit for 12.5:1 static compression, forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (LS7-specific, 4.125" bore), and a Callies Compstar 4340 crankshaft with billet H-beam connecting rods for 9,000 RPM reliability.

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone management with a custom LS7-specific calibration map, integrating a Bosch Motorsport 0280158002 10-bar MAP sensor and a Continental 5WK28026 high-precision wideband O2 controller. The fuel system is upgraded with an Aeromotive A1000 fuel pump, ID1700x injectors (flow-matched to 1,700 cc/min at 43.5 psi), and a Radium Engineering dual-port fuel pressure regulator with ethanol compatibility for E85 blends.

Ohlins TTX40 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), paired with Ultima-specific spherical bearing top mounts and custom-valved Eibach ERS 1,200 lb/in springs. The rear subframe is reinforced with a custom T45 steel tubular structure, while the front suspension utilizes a KW Clubsport 3-way remote reservoir kit with adjustable camber plates and spherical bearing control arms from Superlite Cars for precise alignment under extreme cornering loads.
estetica: Ultima-specific Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with integrated canards and a custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter featuring a 45mm adjustable dive plane. The rear wing is a custom-built 9 Lives Racing GT wing with a 1,800mm span, 300mm chord, and 3D-printed aluminum endplates for optimized downforce at 180+ mph.

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul with a Sparco Pro 2000 seat (Ultima-specific mounting brackets), a custom Alcantara-wrapped MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, 12 o'clock marker), and a full carbon fiber dash overlay with a Motec C127 digital dash display (integrated with the M150 ECU for real-time boost, AFR, and oil pressure monitoring). The roll cage is a custom TIG-welded 4130 chromoly structure with integrated harness bars for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses.

Custom livery by Driftworks featuring a matte vinyl wrap in 'Ultima Racing Green' (Pantone 3425 C) with carbon fiber weave accents, paired with a full dechrome and ceramic coating (C.Quartz UK 3.0) on all exterior metal surfaces. The headlights are upgraded to Hella 90mm Bi-Xenon projectors with custom LED halo rings (Lux H8 6000K), while the taillights are replaced with sequential LED units from LUX Automotive, integrated with a custom CAN bus controller for dynamic lighting effects.
